mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(student_no, email, email_verified, password, nickname, college, credit_score, role, status) VALUES(#{studentNo}, #{email}, #{emailVerified}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{college}, 5.00, #{role}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user SET credit_score = #{creditScore} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_user SET email = #{email}, email_verified = #{emailVerified}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT user_id, nickname, avatar, college, credit_score FROM sys_user WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
